semantic.role: Deterministic pure-function engine for structural diagnostics over a module-level dependency graph (KnowledgeGraph). Provides cycle, dead code, hub, and structural drift detection without any LLM cost.
responsibilities: Detecting cycles in the module dependency graph and returning cycle reports with node sequences.
Detecting dead code by identifying nodes with zero in-degree, excluding known infrastructure directories, and optionally considering public surfaces.
Detecting hub modules that have exceptionally high fan-in (in-degree) above a configurable percentile threshold.
Detecting structural drift between two KnowledgeGraph snapshots by comparing added, removed, and modified nodes and edges.
invariants: All functions are deterministic and side-effect free
Must not import CLI or service-level modules
Dead code detection must exclude paths in KNOWN_INFRA_DIRS

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a zero-cost, deterministic diagnostic layer for the dependency graph that can be used by other engines or services without LLM dependency.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactoring removed legacy CLI aliases and updated docs and schema; no direct changes to this file.

publicSurface.description: Performs DFS-based cycle detection on the knowledge graph and returns an ordered list of CycleReport objects, each containing the sequence of node IDs forming a cycle.
Identifies nodes in the graph with zero in-degree (excluding known infra directories) and returns DeadCodeReport entries; optionally filters by a provided public surfaces map.
Ranks nodes by in-degree and returns HubReport entries for nodes whose in-degree is at or above the specified percentile threshold, indicating high coupling risk.
Compares two KnowledgeGraph snapshots and produces a DriftReport summarizing added, removed, and modified nodes and edges between them.
Interface describing a detected cycle with a nodeIdSequence array of module IDs.
Interface describing a dead code candidate with the dead node ID.
Interface describing a hub module with its node ID and in-degree count.
Interface describing structural drift between two graph snapshots, including lists of added, removed, and modified nodes and edges.

exports.name: detectDeadCode
exports.signature:
detectDeadCode(
  graph: KnowledgeGraph,
  publicSurfacesMap?: Map<string, boolean>,
)
